body:
## What changed

- Appended `REMOVE-ADS-ANDROID-PRODUCT-ID-PARITY-1` to `codex-tasks/open.txt` as a REVIEWER/Scrutinizer finding.

## Why

The current operator runbook says the Google Play Remove Ads product id is `removeads`, while `lib/monetization/purchases.ts` currently passes the full iOS-style `com.billyyiu.swedishcivictest.removeads` id into both Apple and Google billing. Existing monetization and runtime parity tests pass while enforcing the single-id path, so Android purchase/restore can query the wrong Play product unless a producer splits platform product ids and adds coverage.

## Validation

- `npm run test:monetization` passed, showing the existing guard misses this issue.
- `NODE_OPTIONS=--v8-pool-size=1 node --test tests/content-remove-ads-purchase-runtime-parity.test.js` passed, also showing the current parity guard misses this platform split.
- `git diff --check` passed for the queue change.

Direct `HEAD:main` push was attempted first per the flat protocol, but GitHub branch protection rejected it with `GH006: Changes must be made through a pull request`, so this draft PR carries the queue-only meta change.
title: [codex] Queue Android Remove Ads product-id parity finding
